## Summary

## Testing

- [ ] `.\gradlew.bat test`
- [ ] `.\gradlew.bat assembleDebug`
- [ ] Manual device test, if this changes UI, gestures, OCR, screen capture, or PVZ2 flows

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit `local.properties`, signing keys, passwords, tokens, logs, APKs, or private screenshots.
- [ ] I updated `PRIVACY.md` or `SECURITY.md` if this changes permissions, screen capture, Lua execution, storage, or data handling.
- [ ] I updated `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md` if this changes vendored libraries, native binaries, model files, or third-party dependencies.
- [ ] I considered whether imported scripts or automation behavior could harm users or violate another app's rules.
